last_blockers.summary: configure_agent swallowed AgentConfigError from render_zeroclaw — reintroduced #437 stale-bearer risk on configure path. Fixed by narrowing except AgentConfigError catch around render_zeroclaw call and returning (False, 'Zeroclaw render failed: ...'). Added test_lifecycle_zeroclaw_prerender.py.

last_warnings.summary: Linux/darwin path skew: playbook hardcodes /home/, no configure_macos.yaml. Track as follow-up — macOS zeroclaw not GA yet.
servers = [] removal in [mcp] block — this IS the B2 TOML shape fix. Docstring explains + byte-lock test guards. TOML spec: absent key is valid.
_toml_escape control-char coverage. Pre-existing across all agents, not #836 scope. Track as follow-up.
